title: Christmas Sensory Dough Kit with 6 PCS 18oz Glitter Doughs & Accessories(280+pcs), DIY Christmas Crafts Kids, Stocking Stuffers for Kids, Build a Snowman Kit with Ornaments Creative Gift
features: DO YOU WANNA BUILD A SNOWMAN - Colorful dough play set is designed around a fun Christmas theme. It includes: 6 × 3oz magic dough,storage box*1,mould*8,christmas ornaments*18,christmas decorations*15,christmas soft ball*100,shiny hard ball*15,snowman/santa claus diy accessories*119,instruction*1.Kids can build festive Christmas scenes, craft 2 snowmen and 2 Santas (size 1.5-3in), and DIY their very own Christmas dough scenes for endless fun!

NON-TOXIC, SAFE & SPARKLING DOUGH - Glitter dough contains eco-friendly glitter, sequins, and sparkle elements to capture kids’ attention. Made from natural wheat, water, and salt, the dough is non-toxic with no harsh odors. It’s soft, non-sticky, and reusable—simply knead with a small amount of water if it becomes dry. All materials are rigorously tested to ensure safety and reliability

TIDY STORAGE WITH DIVIDER BOX - Packaged in a durable 8.8×6.7" clear ABS plastic box with dividers, the set keeps all accessories neatly separated for easy access. This promotes a sense of organization and tidiness while teaching children to manage materials in an orderly way. The box is resealable and reusable for long-term storage

BOOSTS CREATIVITY AND IMAGINATION - Sensory dough set offers a hands-on experience that fosters creativity, imagination, and cognitive development. It helps children improve hand-eye coordination, fine motor skills, focus, and executive functioning. It's great for collaborative play with parents or friends, and also highly suitable for sensory development in children with autism

PERFECT CHOICE FOR CHRISTMAS GIFTS：Specially designed with festive Christmas elements, this glitter Christmas dough set makes an ideal gift choice for children. Whether for Christmas morning surprises, stocking stuffers, or holiday parties, it sparks joy, inspires creativity, and creates unforgettable family playtime memories
